description: Grade 3 Environmental Activities learning areas about learners, home, school, and nature.

learningAreas.title: Plants
learningAreas.description: Observe parts of plants, how they grow, and how to care for them.

learningAreas.title: Weather
learningAreas.description: Notice daily weather changes and choose safe clothing and activities.

learningAreas.title: Hygiene
learningAreas.description: Practise simple habits that keep the body, home, and school clean.

learningAreas.title: Community
learningAreas.description: Learn about people, places, and responsibilities in the local community.
